economic_notes: Nation has multiple business enterprises including cannabis production (Costa Canna), gaming (Khowutzun Gaming Corporation), forestry (Khowutzun Forest Services), mini mall, residential suites, fisheries, and IT solutions (Mustimuhw Information Solutions). Audit qualified due to unavailable financial statements for Costa Canna Production LLP.
notes: Audit qualified due to unavailable audited financial statements for Costa Canna Production LLP for years ended March 31, 2023 and March 31, 2022. Prior year restated (Note 21). 11 entities fully consolidated including numbered companies, heritage centre, development corporation, fisheries society and IT society. 9 entities accounted for using modified equity method as government business enterprises. Total government transfers calculated as ISC + FNHA + DFO + CMHC + Province of BC Other + Province of BC Host Local Government + Province of BC Forestry Agreement + Coast Salish Employment and Training Society + First Nations Education Steering Committee + Other agencies = 95,833,649. Tobacco tax distributions to citizens of $1,497,965 deducted from accumulated surplus.
